hero.headline: Galgotias University Online MBA in International Business Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+, WES recognised. Total all-in cost Rs 86,400 across 2 years, the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU. International Business Management specialisation with Global Outsourcing, Managing Global Business, International Business, International Finance, and Cross Cultural Management in Sem 3-4. No EMI, no scholarships, no bundled perks.

sections.tldr: Galgotias Online MBA International Business Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised, Rs 86,400 all-in (second-lowest after IGNOU Rs 66,000). Sem 3-4 covers Global Outsourcing, Managing Global Business, International Business, International Finance, and Cross Cultural Management. No EMI, no scholarships, no perks. Best fit for budget-first professionals in export, trade, or MNC roles who need a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA at under Rs 1 lakh.

about.body:
Galgotias University, Greater Noida, was established in 2011 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The university is WES recognised, which is particularly relevant for an international business specialisation since graduates may seek credential evaluation abroad.

The Online MBA in International Business Management covers core MBA subjects in Sem 1-2 and adds global business depth in Sem 3-4 with Global Outsourcing, Managing Global Business, International Business, International Finance, and Cross Cultural Management. Strategic Management and Business Communication are included as common Sem 3 subjects.

At Rs 86,400 all-in, Galgotias is the second-cheapest MBA on EdifyEdu after IGNOU (Rs 66,000). The trade-off: no EMI, no scholarships, no international exchange, no global corporate tie-ups, and limited brand recognition for MNC hiring compared to Amity or Chandigarh University. For professionals in export houses, trading firms, or MNC back offices who need a formal MBA credential at the lowest possible cost, Galgotias International Business Management is a budget-first option.

sem3Subjects.name: Global Outsourcing
sem3Subjects.description: Study BPO, KPO, and IT outsourcing models. Covers vendor selection, SLA design, offshore-onshore coordination, and outsourcing risk management.

sem3Subjects.name: Managing Global Business
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse MNC strategies for market entry, global supply chains, transfer pricing, and cross-border regulatory compliance in different trade zones.

sem3Subjects.name: International Business
sem3Subjects.description: Study international trade theories, WTO frameworks, trade barriers, FDI patterns, and India's export-import policy framework.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Develop written and verbal communication for corporate settings. Covers report writing, presentation skills, and business correspondence.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive environments using Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, and balanced scorecard frameworks. Build corporate and business-level strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Initial Phase)
sem3Subjects.description: Define research problem, conduct literature review, and finalise methodology for the MBA thesis project.

sem4Subjects.name: International Finance
sem4Subjects.description: Cover foreign exchange markets, multinational capital budgeting, cross-border financing, FOREX risk management, and international trade finance instruments.

sem4Subjects.name: Cross Cultural Management
sem4Subjects.description: Apply Hofstede, Trompenaars, and GLOBE frameworks to manage culturally diverse teams, negotiate across cultures, and design inclusive global HR policies.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Ethics and CSR
sem4Subjects.description: Examine ethical decision-making frameworks, corporate governance codes, CSR reporting standards, and stakeholder management in global business contexts.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Final Phase)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete data analysis, write findings, and defend the MBA thesis before the evaluation panel.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 core subjects are common across all Galgotias Online MBA specialisations. See the main Galgotias Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
International Business Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Export-import trading firms, IT and BPO/KPO companies with global delivery, MNC India operations, Logistics and freight forwarding, International banking and trade finance, FMCG and consumer goods with export operations

**Entry-level roles:** Export Documentation Executive, International Business Development Associate, Trade Finance Analyst, Global Operations Coordinator, MNC Management Trainee

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Export Manager, International Business Manager, Global Account Manager, Trade Compliance Manager, Overseas Market Development Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of International Business, VP Global Operations, Country Manager, Chief Commercial Officer, Director of Global Strategy

**Typical hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL (global delivery), Mahindra, Tata International, Adani Ports, DHL, Maersk, HDFC Bank (trade finance), SBI (forex), Amazon Global Selling

Note: Galgotias does not offer international internships, MNC tie-ups, or dedicated placement support for online MBA students.

skills.body:
The Galgotias International Business Management specialisation builds these skills across Sem 3-4:

**Technical skills:**
- International Business: trade theory application, WTO compliance, FDI analysis, export-import documentation, and India's EXIM policy framework
- International Finance: FOREX hedging, LC and trade finance instruments, multinational capital budgeting, and cross-border payment systems
- Global Outsourcing: vendor evaluation, SLA structuring, offshore coordination models, and outsourcing risk assessment

**Applied skills:**
- Managing Global Business: MNC market entry strategy, global supply chain design, transfer pricing basics, and cross-border regulatory navigation
- Cross Cultural Management: Hofstede dimension application, cross-cultural negotiation, global team management, and inclusive workplace policy design

**Soft skills:** Business communication for international stakeholders, strategic thinking for global market analysis, ethical reasoning for cross-border compliance and governance.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Galgotias Online MBA International Business Management against peers on EdifyEdu:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper but does not offer a dedicated International Business Management specialisation with subjects like Global Outsourcing or Cross Cultural Management. Galgotias has more specialisation depth for international business.

**vs Amity Online MBA International Business Management (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.6x the cost with NIRF #22 University ranking and broader global business curriculum. Amity brand carries stronger weight for MNC hiring. Galgotias wins only on cost.

**vs Chandigarh University Online MBA (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 and offers PwC co-teaching. CU costs nearly 2x Galgotias. CU does not have a dedicated International Business specialisation in its standard online MBA lineup, making Galgotias more specialised in this area.

**vs LPU Online MBA International Business (Rs 1,61,000-2,00,000):** LPU offers zero-cost EMI, Coursera access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU International Business is a more established programme with better career services. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the price but lacks EMI and perks.

**vs JIIT Online MBA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT offers a mandatory internship component and AI core modules. JIIT costs over 2x Galgotias. For tech-adjacent international business roles, JIIT provides stronger practical exposure.

fees.body:
Galgotias University Online MBA in International Business Management has a single fee track with no EMI, no scholarships, and no bundled perks.

**Total all-in cost: Rs 86,400**

- Tuition fee: Rs 76,200 (Rs 33,000/year approx, paid per semester)
- Examination fee: Rs 8,000 (Rs 4,000/year)
- Registration fee: Rs 1,200 (one-time)
- Alumni fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)

**No EMI facility** from the university. No third-party EMI partner announced.
**No scholarships** or fee waivers available.
**No bundled perks** such as international exchange, Coursera, or placement guarantees.

This is the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU at Rs 66,000. The fee advantage is the primary reason to consider Galgotias over NIRF-ranked competitors.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Galgotias University, Greater Noida. It carries the MBA designation with International Business Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is mentioned per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation, which is particularly useful for professionals in international business seeking overseas opportunities or immigration. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Galgotias Online MBA International Business Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Arun
items.liked: International Business and International Finance subjects were directly relevant to my role at an export house. At Rs 86,400, this was the cheapest IB-focused MBA I could find.
items.disliked: No international exposure, no exchange programmes, no MNC tie-ups. The 'international' part is purely academic, not experiential.
items.body: I work in export documentation and needed an MBA for career progression. Galgotias delivered the credential at an affordable cost. The WES recognition was a bonus since I am considering Canada PR. For actual international business exposure, you will need to build that through your own career, not this programme.

items.name: Kavita
items.liked: Cross Cultural Management and Global Outsourcing were subjects I have not seen in other budget MBA programmes. The LMS was functional.
items.disliked: Brand recognition for Galgotias at MNCs is weak. During interviews at global consulting firms, the MBA was accepted as a qualification but did not add brand value.
items.body: Good value if cost is your primary constraint. For MNC careers where MBA brand matters during hiring, Amity or CU will carry more weight. Galgotias works best when you already have the career trajectory and just need the formal credential.

items.name: Sanjay
items.liked: Managing Global Business gave me practical frameworks for my role at a logistics MNC. The fee was genuinely affordable, no loan needed.
items.disliked: No EMI option. Had to arrange the full semester fee each time. No alumni network for international business professionals.
items.body: For professionals already in export, trade, or MNC back-office roles who need an MBA credential under Rs 1 lakh, Galgotias International Business Management is a rational pick. The WES recognition adds value for overseas applications. Just be clear that no placement support or corporate partnerships come with this programme.

faqs.question: Is the Galgotias International Business MBA useful for export-import careers?
faqs.answer: Yes. The curriculum covers International Business, International Finance, and Global Outsourcing, which are directly relevant to export-import operations, trade finance, and EXIM compliance roles.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer international exchange or study tours?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer international exchange programmes, study tours, or overseas internships for the online MBA. The international business focus is academic, not experiential.

faqs.question: Is the WES recognition useful for this specialisation?
faqs.answer: Yes. WES recognition is particularly relevant for International Business Management graduates who may apply for credential evaluation in Canada, Australia, or other countries for immigration or overseas employment.

faqs.question: How does Galgotias IB MBA compare to Amity's?
faqs.answer: Amity Online MBA International Business Management costs Rs 2,25,000 with NIRF #22 ranking and broader global curriculum. Amity carries stronger MNC brand recognition. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is 2.6x cheaper but lacks Amity's brand weight and career services.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer EMI for this programme?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer any EMI facility or third-party EMI partner. The fee is paid directly to the university per semester.

chooseIf: Your top priority is the lowest possible fee for a NAAC A+ MBA with international business focus. At Rs 86,400, Galgotias is the cheapest option with dedicated IB subjects.
You need a WES-recognised MBA for international credential evaluation at minimal cost.
You already work in export, trade, or MNC operations and need a formal MBA credential for promotion, not brand prestige.
consider: If MNC brand recognition matters, Amity Online MBA International Business Management (NIRF #22, Rs 2,25,000) carries stronger weight in multinational hiring.
If you need EMI, LPU Online MBA International Business at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) offers 24-month zero-cost EMI.
If NIRF ranking is important, Chandigarh University (NIRF #19, Rs 1,65,000) offers stronger institutional credibility, though without a dedicated IB specialisation.
